name: Steamed Blue Crabs - the Truly Maryland Way
recipeIngredient: 3 Live (and lively) Maryland blue hard crabs
recipeInstructions: Mix seasonings, white vinegar, and beer (or water) well. Place one-half of the crabs in a very large pot with rack and tight-fitting lid. Pour half of the seasoning mixture over the top of the crabs. Add the remaining crabs and liquid. Steam, covered until the crabs turn bright red in color, about 20 or 30 minutes. Serve hot or cold. Makes about 9 to 12 servings, depending on size of crabs. If using two pots, layer crabs and measure seasoning mixture accordingly. Serve crabs immediately if to be eaten hot. To serve cold, bring to room temperature and refrigerate until ready to serve. Under no circumstances should live and steamed crabs ever be stored in such a manner that they could come into contact with each other.
